comment: Source of truth for global_broadcast_messages (synced to Mongo). Examples: Documentation/Notification_Sys/examples/global_broadcast_messages.examples.json. Keep stable _id per row; after changing _id or removing rows, re-run sync so orphans are deleted (else duplicate Welcome modals). Sync local: ansible-playbook -i localhost, -c local playbooks/00_local/sync_global_broadcast_messages.yml. Sync rop01: ansible-playbook -i playbooks/rop01/inventory.ini playbooks/rop01/sync_global_broadcast_messages.yml -e vm_name=rop01 (after source .env.prod).

messages.title: Welcome to Dutch
messages.body: New here? Learn the rules and try the interactive tutorial before your first match.

messages.title: Update available
messages.body: A new version of Dutch is on the store with fixes and improvements. Tap Update to open your app store listing.
